title: The Alternative Bank Unveils Flagship Effurun Branch, Sets Bold Pace for Delta’s Economic Future - FinancialEDGE
description: The Alternative Bank (AltBank), Nigeria’s leading non-interest bank, has opened its flagship branch in Effurun, Delta State, a bold move in its mission to reshape banking in Nigeria. Strategically positioned toserve the wider Edo/Delta region, the branch is designed as a hub for purposeful banking and real financial empowerment for individuals, entrepreneurs, and businesses.
